component.name: BlogsPage

Label.text: UP / DOWN to scroll | LEFT / RIGHT to switch page

component.script:
function init() m.loadingLabel = m.top.findNode("loadingLabel") m.cardsGrid = m.top.findNode("cardsGrid") m.scrollHint = m.top.findNode("scrollHint")
m.top.findNode("pageTitle").font.size = 28 m.top.findNode("pageSubtitle").font.size = 18
' Start fetching data immediately (runs in background Task thread) m.apiTask = CreateObject("roSGNode", "BlogsApiTask") m.apiTask.observeField("result", "onApiResult") m.apiTask.apiUrl = "https://opencollective.com/babel/members/all.json?TierId=1906&limit=10&offset=0" m.apiTask.control = "RUN" end function
' ── Called when the API task delivers results ────────────── sub onApiResult() As Void data = m.apiTask.result if data = invalid then m.loadingLabel.text = "Failed to load data. Check your connection." return end if
m.loadingLabel.visible = false m.scrollHint.visible = true
' Layout constants cardW = 370 cardH = 260 hGap = 25 vGap = 30 cols = 3 startY = 10
for i = 0 to data.count() - 1 item = data[i] col = i mod cols row = i \ cols x = col * (cardW + hGap) y = startY + row * (cardH + vGap)
card = m.cardsGrid.createChild("BlogCard") card.translation = [x, y]
if item.name <> invalid then card.memberName = item.name if item.role <> invalid then card.memberRole = item.role if item.image <> invalid then card.imgUrl = item.image if item.description <> invalid then card.memberDesc = item.description end for end sub
' ── Driven by MainPage when user presses UP / DOWN ───────── sub onScrollChange() m.cardsGrid.translation = [0, m.top.scrollY] end sub
